features.description: Comprehensive test metric improvements and testing tools
steps: Verify CLI testing harness (api-spec, cli-drift validations), baseline test coverage (>90%), and module-specific coverage targets across the codebase
Verify os.Exit(1) calls in gate.go, set_phase.go, and status.go are replaced with proper RunE error returns to enable unit testing error paths (Completed)

features.description: Reducing duplication and streamlining API handlers
steps: Verify Pagination Standardization
Verify standard ErrorResponse JSON structure on 400 Error
Verify Response Helpers (Pending): Check for usage of `RenderSuccess`, `JSONSuccess`, and `ErrorResponse` handlers across controllers
Verify Base Handler Struct (Pending): Review handler method signatures to confirm they use a base struct to eliminate session parsing duplication
Verify Service Layer Consolidation (Pending): Inspect service layer structures and ensure validation middleware runs consistently
Verify Route Grouping (Completed): Inspect code and ensure auth-required routes are fully separated from public routes via grouped middleware

features.description: Features and architectural improvements planned for the next phase
steps: Verify Apple/Facebook Platforms (Pending): Click on 'Apple' and 'Facebook' login buttons in the identity section and configure dev accounts
Verify DevLogin Hardening (Pending): Ensure hitting the DevLogin route in a prod-like condition executes the real claim workflow instead of a skip mechanism
Verify Admin Customization (Pending): Navigate to Admin settings and inject a custom dashboard color or font, then confirm the page updates dynamically
Verify Expiration Ticker (Pending): Confirm that the background service correctly tags listings older than their configured TTL config as 'expired'
Verify Location Filter (Pending): Perform a map-based search query like `?filterLocation=City` and assert that the returned result list matches accurately
Verify Browser Integration Test (Pending): Trigger the browser integration test suite and verify 'Create Listing' finishes flawlessly start to end
Verify Security Hardening (Pending): Identify dependencies utilizing alpine:latest and ensure that CVE-2025-60876 patches are updated
Verify Fat Handler Structs (Pending): Use structural tag libraries rather than custom parsing to validate object bindings

features.description: Verified necessity of MockImageService in listing tests and removed it where possible.
steps: Replaced MockImageService with real LocalImageService using t.TempDir() in TestHandleCreate_WithImage to avoid I/O pollution.
Replaced MockImageService with real LocalImageService using t.TempDir() in TestListingHandler_Upload_Valid.
Removed unused testifyMock import from listing_upload_test.go.
Confirmed MockImageService is still needed in TestHandleCreate_ImageUploadError to simulate upload failures.
Implemented TestVerifyApiSpec_FullDriftReport for complete drift aggregation
Implemented TestVerifyApiSpec_EmptyFiles for minimal docs edge cases
Implemented TestVerifyApiSpec_MarkdownPathEdgeCases for path normalization
Implemented TestVerifyApiSpec_ExtractMarkdownRoutes_Direct for unit testing extraction logic
Verified all tests pass with GOCACHE/GOTMPDIR /tmp configuration
Passed all harness gates: red-test, api-spec, implementation, lint, coverage, browser-verification

features.description: Granular refactoring tasks to reduce the context cost of the top 10 most expensive files
steps: Verify monolithic test files (e.g., handler_test.go, sqlite_test.go, listing_write_test.go), frontend scripts (app.js), and CLI command definitions have been successfully extracted into modular, context-efficient files while maintaining test suite integrity (Completed)
Verify Interface Segregation (CQRS): Extract ListingStore into ListingReader and ListingWriter interfaces in internal/domain to eliminate sqlite_listing.go structural fragmentation

Verify Test Suite Isolation: Refactor residual large test files like sqlite_listing_test.go and listing_validation_test.go to use testify/suite or targeted sub-test groupings to further reduce context bloat

Verify Domain Map Documentation: Create a domain mapping reference in .agents/rules/ indicating where specific business validations (Create, Geocoding, Jobs) are physically located to prevent context discovery thrashing

features.description: Unified CI/CD pipeline using Go-Task with security-first patterns, coverage anti-degradation, and deep local-to-cloud parity.
steps: Verify the orchestrated CI/CD lifecycle by executing 'task pre-commit' and 'task ci', confirming all quality (lint, build, test), security (static, dynamic, vulncheck), and drift gates pass across environments.
Optimize 'vulncheck' in Taskfile.yml by adding a binary existence check to skip 'go install' and reduce local overhead. (Completed)
Expand Taskfile binary-existence check optimization to 'golangci-lint' and 'gitleaks'. (Completed)
Extract coverage anti-degradation logic from .github/workflows/ci.yml into scripts/ci/check-coverage-drift.sh for better reuse. (Completed)
Update .github/workflows/ci.yml to use the distilled check-coverage-drift.sh script (Completed)
Fixed pre-existing gosec-rationale issue in security_test.go discovered during verification (Completed)
Refactor Taskfile.yml to make GOPATH isolation optional via an 'ISOLATE_GO' flag, defaulting to 'true' for security. (Completed)
Implemented vulncheck:install task with status check to skip go install if binary exists
Refactored vulncheck and ci:vulncheck to use the local binary and shared dependency
Removed redundant environment variable definitions from Taskfile.yml
Refactor Taskfile.yml to make GOPATH isolation optional via an 'ISOLATE_GO' flag, defaulting to 'true' for security. (Completed)
Updated agent-exec.sh, agent-drift-check.sh, and verify_restart.sh to respect the ISOLATE_GO environment variable.
Completed: Refactor Taskfile.yml for dynamic GOBIN resolution (ISOLATE_GO respect)
Completed: Optimize Taskfile vars with conditional go env execution
Completed: Unified coverage anti-degradation logic in scripts/ci/check-coverage-drift.sh
Completed: Replaced verify-threshold.sh with unified script across local and CI

features.description: Replace the 244-line pre-commit.sh shell orchestrator with a declarative Taskfile.yml using go-task, reducing agent context cost from 476 lines to ~80 lines.
steps: Verify security-audit permissions: Updated Taskfile.yml to use explicit GOPATH/GOCACHE for security-audit tasks
Verify govulncheck config: Moved module path resolution to local environment variable scope to sidestep permission conflicts
Verify false-positives masking: Add whitelist exceptions to security audit for explicitly safe internal tool variables

Verify declarative Go-Task orchestration: Ensure Taskfile.yml encapsulates all CI/CD gates, auxiliary tasks, and workflow orchestrations, replaces legacy pre-commit.sh/ci-local.sh scripts, and is verified via `task pre-commit` and `task ci` execution. (Completed)
Verify CI Vulncheck fix: Update `ci:vulncheck` in Taskfile.yml to use a workspace-local GOPATH or temporary writeable cache (Completed)
Verify Task ci:security: Run `task ci:security` and ensure it passes all dependencies (vulncheck + harness) in the current environment (Completed)
Verify Security.go Migration: Replace all `os.Open` and `os.Read*` calls in internal/agent/security.go with `util.Safe*` equivalents (Completed)
Verify Agent Integrity: Run full unit test suite for internal/agent to ensure no regressions in I/O or security scanning (Completed)
Verify AST XSS Expansion: Migrate 'onclick', 'Dangerous JS', and 'Forbidden CDN' regex checks into AST-based logic in security.go (Completed)
Verify AST Documentation: Add granular unit tests to security_test.go specifically targeting the newly ported AST-based XSS cases (Completed)

features.description: Implemented AST-based security checkers for SQLi and XSS
steps: Implemented checkSQLi and checkXSS in internal/agent/security.go
Added unit tests in internal/agent/security_test.go
Integrated with 10x Engineer harness verify command
Verified implementation with unit tests

Verified changes with unit tests and full CI audit
